title: Un-memoized doubling recursion is exponential
statement_informal: A recursion that doubles its subproblems each level (no memoization) has 2^k - 1 calls.

cost_model.notes: Why naive recursion (e.g. unmemoized Fibonacci) blows up.

references: Master theorem / divide-and-conquer recurrences; cf. Knuth's analyses & Cormen et al.
